name: 方法与数据
description: 用于描述数据来源、样本限制、变量测量、识别问题和分析策略

expressions.note: 最自然，强调研究利用现有数据资源
expressions.example: We draw on data from a national household survey.

expressions.note: 突出代表性，适合强调外推范围
expressions.example: We use nationally representative data on young adults.

expressions.note: 强调数据结构为纵向追踪，适合生命历程研究
expressions.example: The analysis relies on longitudinal data from three survey waves.

expressions.note: 强调数据链接，适合行政数据或多源数据
expressions.example: We link survey records to administrative earnings histories.

expressions.note: 最常用，适合明确说明纳入标准
expressions.example: We restrict the sample to respondents aged 25 to 54.

expressions.note: 强调分析范围，而不只是样本筛选
expressions.example: We limit the analysis to first marriages.

expressions.note: 适合报告排除条件，清楚直接
expressions.example: We exclude observations with missing employment histories.

expressions.note: 比 restrict 更强调研究焦点，语气更柔和
expressions.example: We focus on the subset of workers entering the labor market.

expressions.note: 最适合统计模型，直接连接模型类型
expressions.example: We estimate linear probability models for college completion.

expressions.note: 比 use 更正式，适合方法段总述
expressions.example: We employ event-history models to examine union formation.

expressions.note: 强调具体执行某种策略或检验，操作感更强
expressions.example: We implement a difference-in-differences design.

expressions.note: 强调研究设计选择，适合说明为何采用某框架
expressions.example: We adopt a cohort-comparison approach.

clusters.meaning: 为了解决内生性/选择偏误

expressions.note: 通用表述，适合说明识别策略的目的
expressions.example: We address concerns about endogeneity using sibling fixed effects.

expressions.note: 强调选择进入某状态或群体，适合样本选择问题
expressions.example: The model accounts for selection into higher education.

expressions.note: 明确针对遗漏变量偏误，适合控制变量或固定效应
expressions.example: Family fixed effects reduce omitted-variable bias.

expressions.note: 强调利用外生或准外生变异，适合识别设计
expressions.example: We exploit variation in school entry cutoffs.

expressions.note: 标准方法语言，适合从概念转向变量
expressions.example: We operationalize precarity as unstable monthly employment.

expressions.note: 强调指标用于捕捉概念，语气更自然
expressions.example: We capture social origin using parental education.

expressions.note: 最直接，适合描述具体变量或题项
expressions.example: We measure wellbeing with a five-item scale.

expressions.note: 强调指标只是近似替代，适合承认测量限制
expressions.example: We proxy for wealth with homeownership status.

expressions.note: 标准被动写法，适合变量定义列表
expressions.example: Employment stability is measured as months continuously employed.

expressions.note: 强调测量来源或构成，适合复合指标
expressions.example: The index is based on three survey items.

expressions.note: 强调变量由多个信息生成，适合指数或分类变量
expressions.example: The neighborhood measure is constructed from census tract data.

expressions.en: takes the value of one if
expressions.note: 适合二元变量编码，清晰且可复现
expressions.example: The indicator takes the value of one if respondents are employed.

expressions.note: 最直接，适合说明分类或二元编码
expressions.example: We code cohabitation as a separate union status.

expressions.note: 适合把个体分入多个组别，读者容易理解
expressions.example: We classify respondents into three employment categories.

expressions.note: 强调合并类别，适合处理小样本或稀疏分类
expressions.example: We collapse occupations into ten broad groups.

expressions.en: treat X as a categorical variable
expressions.note: 强调变量进入模型的形式，而不只是取值
expressions.example: We treat field of study as a categorical variable.

expressions.en: our analytic strategy proceeds in three steps
expressions.note: 适合方法段开头，结构清楚
expressions.example: Our analytic strategy proceeds in three steps.

expressions.note: 适合概括从描述统计到模型分析的顺序
expressions.example: We first describe cohort patterns, then estimate regression models.

expressions.note: 更书面，适合多个模型逐步推进
expressions.example: The analysis unfolds in stages, beginning with baseline models.

expressions.note: 适合方法段末尾说明验证策略
expressions.example: We assess robustness by varying the sample definition.
